fed_stance.label: Neutral hold
fed_stance.source: CME FedWatch for 30 Apr 2026 showed 0.0% ease, 99.5% no change, and 0.5% hike, so the Fed stance remains a neutral hold.

real_yields.label: Flat
real_yields.source: FRED DFII10 printed 1.95 on 2026-04-10 versus 1.95 on 2026-04-09, keeping real yields flat under the >5 bp methodology threshold.

usd_dxy.label: Weak/falling
usd_dxy.source: TradingView DXY was 98.351, down 0.022 (-0.02%) as of 06:38 GMT on 2026-04-14, which keeps the dollar factor in weak/falling territory.

risk_mood.label: Balanced
risk_mood.source: Cboe VIX spot was 19.12 on 2026-04-13, which remains in the methodology's balanced 15-20 band rather than a high-stress regime.

vix_direction.label: Flat
vix_direction.source: The official Cboe VIX page showed a 0.00% daily change, so VIX direction is classified as flat rather than falling or rising.

growth_narrative.label: Slowing
growth_narrative.source: Atlanta Fed GDPNow remained at 1.3% for 2026:Q1, updated 2026-04-09, versus the repository's prior 1.6% baseline, so the U.S. growth narrative remains slowing.

oil_supply_shock.label: Tightening
oil_supply_shock.source: EIA's 2026-04-07 press release said the Hormuz closure and related outages are key forecast drivers, with 7.5 million b/d shut in during March and 9.1 million b/d expected in April, which supports a tightening oil-supply-shock classification.

oil_inventories.label: Building
oil_inventories.source: The EIA weekly petroleum summary reported U.S. commercial crude inventories increased by 3.1 million barrels to 464.7 million barrels for the week ending 2026-04-03, a bearish inventory build.

gold_etf_flows.label: Outflowing
gold_etf_flows.source: The World Gold Council's March 2026 ETF-flows report said global gold ETFs saw record monthly outflows of US$12bn in March, so the current ETF-flow signal is negative.

credit_spreads.label: Widening
credit_spreads.source: FRED high-yield OAS moved from 2.90 on 2026-04-09 to 2.94 on 2026-04-10, which classifies as widening credit spreads in this run.

sox.label: Rising
sox.source: TradingView SOX closed at 9,039.52, up 149.70 (+1.68%) on 2026-04-13, preserving a rising semiconductor signal.

move_index.label: Rising
move_index.source: TradingView MOVE closed at 74.4185, up 2.2644 (+3.14%) on 2026-04-13, so the rates-volatility factor is rising and therefore negative for Nasdaq under the methodology.

yield_curve_2s10s.label: Steepening
yield_curve_2s10s.source: FRED T10Y2Y increased from 0.50 on 2026-04-10 to 0.52 on 2026-04-13, which classifies the curve as steepening in this run.

copper.label: Unverified / flat
copper.source: Live copper pages were blocked or incomplete in this session, so the copper factor is conservatively scored flat pending manual verification rather than guessed.

ecb_stance.label: Mildly hawkish hold
ecb_stance.source: The ECB previously held rates while emphasizing upside inflation risks, and the latest ECB bulletin still highlights energy-related inflation risk, supporting a mildly hawkish hold classification.

rate_diff_eur_usd.label: Stable
rate_diff_eur_usd.source: With the Fed neutral and the ECB on hold rather than actively easing or hiking today, the near-term EUR-USD policy differential is best treated as stable.

eurozone_growth.label: Slowing / downgraded
eurozone_growth.source: ECB staff now expect euro area GDP growth of 0.9% in 2026, revised down by 0.3 percentage points from December 2025 projections, so the eurozone growth outlook is classified as slowing.

rba_stance.label: Hawkish/tightening
rba_stance.source: The March 2026 RBA tightening backdrop remains intact in the repository and no direct reversal was verified in this run, so the RBA stance stays hawkish.

rate_diff_aud_usd.label: Widening vs USD
rate_diff_aud_usd.source: A hawkish RBA backdrop against a neutral Fed still leaves the AUD-USD short-rate differential supportive for AUD.

risk_sentiment_aud.label: Neutral
risk_sentiment_aud.source: The broad volatility regime is balanced rather than decisively risk-on or risk-off, so the AUD-specific sentiment factor remains neutral.

china_growth.label: Accelerating
china_growth.source: China's official March manufacturing PMI rose to 50.4 from 49.0 and returned to expansionary territory, which supports an accelerating China-growth classification.

boj_stance.label: Hold
boj_stance.source: The latest directly referenced BoJ policy signal in the repository remains a hold, and no new official decision reversing that stance was verified in this run.

rate_diff_jpy_usd.label: Improving for JPY
rate_diff_jpy_usd.source: A neutral Fed combined with the post-normalization BoJ backdrop still keeps the policy-divergence story favorable for yen futures.

geopolitical_risk.label: Elevated
geopolitical_risk.source: The EIA April 2026 outlook explicitly says the Hormuz closure and related outages are key drivers of the oil forecast, so geopolitical risk for crude remains elevated.
